subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-05-14 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: All things in this place can be seen in their utmost degree of beauty and elegance, and it is evident that they have fulfilled the purpose of their creation
subcodes.first_line_orig: در این محل جمیع اشیا در منتها درجهٴ نمایش و لطافت که نتیجه و کمال خلقت آنهاست مشهودند
subcodes.subjects: @development of capacity and readiness, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @purpose; goal of creation
